title: coronopus pinnatifidus
intro: Coronopus pinnatifidus, also known as rock cress or sea purslane, is a type of flowering plant in the family Brassicaceae. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Coronopus pinnatifidus include its ability to treat wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve circulation. Coronopus pinnatifidus can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or salve, and is also used in traditional cooking and as a garnish, although its medicinal uses are more commonly associated with its herbal preparations.
